raw_text: There was a suspicious person walking around Oak Street last night around 10 PM. He was wearing a hoodie. Very scary, I couldn't sleep!
OFFICIAL: Phishing emails targeting local bank customers reported. Emails claim your account is locked and ask for credentials. Do NOT click links. Contact your bank directly.
UGH I hate my neighbors they are so loud every night!!! This neighborhood has gone downhill. Nobody cares anymore!!
ALERT: New ransomware strain 'LockBit-X' targeting home routers in residential areas. Ensure your router firmware is updated. Default passwords must be changed immediately.
Multiple car break-ins reported on Pine Road last week. At least 4 vehicles were broken into overnight. Police report filed. Avoid leaving valuables in cars.
Does anyone know a good pizza place nearby? Also I think I saw a raccoon near the dumpsters lol
SCAM ALERT: Elderly residents receiving calls from fake 'IRS agents' demanding gift card payments. This is a scam. The IRS does not call demanding immediate payment. Report to 1-800-366-4484.
Streetlight on Maple Ave has been out for 3 days. Dark stretch near the park. Please report to city maintenance.
